title: Blechnum medium
taxonomy: Blechnum medium is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae, commonly known as the chain ferns or rock ferns. The Blechnaceae family belongs to the larger class Polypodiopsida, which includes all ferns. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its vascular tissue and leaf structure.
